3083960.name: The Test of Insanity
3083960.description:
With a mix of twisted puzzles, brain-teasing quizzes, and mind-bending mini-games, The Test of Insanity will test the very limits of your brain. Whether you’re a genius or an influencer, a billionaire or the person they just fired, whoever you are, you can be sure of one thing: The Test of Insanity will challenge your mind to the core, in ways you’ve never been challenged before. These puzzles may seem easy at a glance, but the answers may not be what you're thinking. However, solving these puzzle can also be quite satisfying. If you like puzzle games, mind twisters, or weird games, this game is for you.

Featuring:

⭐ Not so traditional math problems
⭐ Weird word puzzles
⭐ Trivia of not obvious stuff
⭐ Skill tests that are incredibly difficult
⭐ Cute squirrels
⭐ And more things that make you go nuts...

From math problems and word puzzles to trivia and skill tests, this puzzle game offers a diverse range of brain challenges that will keep you hooked. Inspired by the infamous Impossible Quiz, our game requires you to think outside the box and embrace the ridiculous.

Question is: How far will you go before going insane? Many don’t pass level 1.
